education.title: Personal vs organization keys
education.description: Choose the key type that matches how your integration should act.
education.personalDescription: Personal keys act as your user account. Organization API routes only return data that your current organization membership allows.
education.organizationDescription: Organization keys act as a service principal for one organization. They are not reduced when the creator later changes role or leaves.
education.scopesDescription: Both key types are limited by the API scopes selected on the key.
education.managementDescription: Only roles with API key permissions can create, edit, or delete organization keys.

table.title: API keys
table.personalDescription: Create and manage keys that act as your user account.
table.organizationDescription: Create and manage keys that act for this organization.
table.readOnlyNotice: You can review organization keys, but your role cannot change them.
table.emptyDescription: Create a key when an external integration needs API access.

form.nameHint: Maximum 32 characters. Use a name that identifies the integration.
form.enabledHint: Disabled keys are rejected by the API.
form.rateLimitHint: Limit request bursts from this key.
form.createDescription: The secret is shown only once after creation.
form.editDescription: Changes apply to future API requests that use this key.
form.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes “{name}”. Requests using this key will stop working.
form.secretDescription: This secret will not be shown again.

errors.invalidRequest: Review the API key form and try again.
errors.nameTooLong: Use 32 characters or fewer for the key name.
errors.organizationIdRequired: Organization context is required for organization keys.
errors.rateLimitMaxInvalid: Enter a request limit between 1 and 1000000.
errors.createFailed: API key could not be created.
errors.updateFailed: API key could not be updated.
errors.deleteFailed: API key could not be deleted.
errors.permissionDenied: Your role does not allow this API key action.
errors.noUpdateValues: Change at least one field before saving.

basicRead.label: Basic read
basicRead.description: Read the current API principal metadata.

organizationRead.label: Organization read
organizationRead.description: Read organization records available to the key.

organizationReadAll.label: Organization read all
organizationReadAll.description: Read organization, members, teams, and team members.
